# Mind & Metric Media

> Auckland-based performance media agency specialising in paid search (SEM) and independent paid media audits. Built on incrementality testing and real measurement — the founding question of every engagement is "what would happen if we didn't spend this money?" Winner of the Google Honours Agency SuperStar Award, 2025.

Mind & Metric Media (MMM — as in Marketing Mix Modeling) is founded and led by Walker Zhao, former Digital Performance Director at WPP Media Australia & New Zealand, with 10+ years across FMCG and digital marketing including Nestlé, Coca-Cola, Carlsberg, AA New Zealand and WPP. The agency works with a small number of clients at a time, typically businesses spending $5,000 to $100,000+ per month on paid media. Retainer or project engagements, no lock-in contracts, all reporting in plain numbers.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.mindandmetricmedia.co.nz/): Positioning, philosophy, and why media budgets should be held to investment standards
- [Services](https://www.mindandmetricmedia.co.nz/services.html): SEM management (Google Ads & Bing) and independent paid media consultation & audits, with common questions answered
- [About](https://www.mindandmetricmedia.co.nz/about.html): Walker Zhao's background, credentials, and how the work gets proven
- [Contact](https://www.mindandmetricmedia.co.nz/contact.html): Request a free 30-minute diagnostic call — no pitch, no obligation

## Contact

- Email: enquiries@mindandmetricmedia.co.nz
- Location: Auckland, New Zealand (working remotely across New Zealand)
